cmd:
bash -c 
set -e
cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/gpu4pyscf/src
cmake -S gpu4pyscf/lib -B /var/lib/jenkins/moat/agent_space/g4p_build -DUSE_HIP=ON \
  -DCMAKE_HIP_ARCHITECTURES="gfx90a;gfx1100" \
  -DCMAKE_HIP_COMPILER=/opt/rocm/llvm/bin/clang++ \
  -DBUILD_CUTLASS=OFF -DBUILD_LIBXC=OFF -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release > /var/lib/jenkins/moat/agent_space/cfg.log 2>&1
cmake --build /var/lib/jenkins/moat/agent_space/g4p_build -j8 > /var/lib/jenkins/moat/agent_space/build.log 2>&1
python3 -m pytest -q gpu4pyscf/scf/tests/test_rhf.py gpu4pyscf/scf/tests/test_uhf.py gpu4pyscf/scf/tests/test_int2c2e.py gpu4pyscf/scf/tests/test_int4c2e.py

conda run -n py_3.12 bash -c 
  set -e
  cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/gpu4pyscf/src
  cmake -S gpu4pyscf/lib -B /var/lib/jenkins/moat/agent_space/gpu4pyscf_build     -DUSE_HIP=ON     -DCMAKE_HIP_ARCHITECTURES='gfx90a;gfx1100'     -DCMAKE_HIP_COMPILER=/opt/rocm/llvm/bin/clang++     -DBUILD_CUTLASS=OFF -DBUILD_LIBXC=OFF     -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release     -DLIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY=/var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/gpu4pyscf/src/gpu4pyscf/lib 2>&1
  cmake --build /var/lib/jenkins/moat/agent_space/gpu4pyscf_build -j8 2>&1

conda run -n py_3.12 bash -c 
  set -e
  export HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0
  export PYTHONPATH=/var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/gpu4pyscf/src
  cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/gpu4pyscf/src
  python -m pytest gpu4pyscf/scf/tests/test_rhf.py gpu4pyscf/scf/tests/test_uhf.py gpu4pyscf/scf/tests/test_int2c2e.py gpu4pyscf/scf/tests/test_int4c2e.py -v --tb=short 2>&1

conda run -n py_3.12 bash -c 
  set -e
  export HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0
  export PYTHONPATH=/var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/gpu4pyscf/src
  cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/gpu4pyscf/src
  python -m pytest gpu4pyscf/scf/tests/test_scf_j_engine.py gpu4pyscf/scf/tests/test_scf_jk.py -v --tb=short 2>&1

conda run -n py_3.12 bash -c 
  set -e
  export HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0
  export PYTHONPATH=/var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/gpu4pyscf/src
  cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/gpu4pyscf/src
  python /var/lib/jenkins/moat/agent_space/sentinel_proof.py 2>&1

bash -c 
set -e
export HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0
export PYTHONPATH=/var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/gpu4pyscf/src
cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/gpu4pyscf/src
python -m pytest gpu4pyscf/scf/tests/test_rhf.py gpu4pyscf/scf/tests/test_uhf.py gpu4pyscf/scf/tests/test_int2c2e.py gpu4pyscf/scf/tests/test_int4c2e.py -v --tb=short 2>&1

python -m pytest gpu4pyscf/scf/tests/test_scf_j_engine.py gpu4pyscf/scf/tests/test_scf_jk.py -v --tb=short 2>&1
